name: Vincent Nguini
abstract: Vincent Nguini (July 1952 – December 8, 2017) was a Cameroonian musician and guitarist. Nguini was best known for his work with American singer-songwriter Paul Simon, with whom he recorded and toured for 30 years.

concerts.label: Global Encounters: South African Sounds featuring Hugh Masekela and Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Hugh Masekela and Friends: African Time
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: I got to play with Vincent Nguini and Bakithi Kumalo with Paul Simon, you know, the “Graceland” guys and stuff
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012
